description_long: This is a large, rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched, multi-tiered gable roof covered in wooden shingles. The structure features a prominent front porch with arched supports and a wooden staircase leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are constructed from dark, weathered timber planks, giving the cabin a traditional and sturdy appearance. Multiple rectangular windows with wooden frames are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides, allowing natural light into the interior. The rear of the cabin includes an extended covered area, possibly for additional entry or storage. The overall design evokes a traditional mountain or forest lodge, suitable for residential use in a rural or semi-urban setting.
description: A large, rustic wooden cabin with a steep, multi-tiered gable roof, front porch, and symmetrically arranged windows. The dark timber exterior and shingled roof give it a traditional, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a covered porch, arched supports, and a staircase leading up to the door.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a flat wall with three symmetrically placed rectangular windows and no visible doors.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain wall with two windows and the continuation of the shingled roof, with no porch or entrance visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights an extended covered area with a secondary entrance and staircase, as well as additional porch space.
attribute_roof_type: multi-tiered gable roof with wooden shingles and deep overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front and side facades, with three on the left side and two on the rear, all evenly spaced and framed in wood.
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade, accessible via the porch, and a secondary door on the right side under the covered extension.
